---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report a typo, missing section, or confusing phrasing in our docs
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the documentation issue
Please describe what is wrong with the documentation. Is there a typo? Is a code example broken?

## Location
Please link to the specific markdown file or line number (e.g., `docs/installation.md line 42`).

## Suggested Fix
(Optional) If you know how to fix it, please propose the change here! Or better yet, open a Pull Request!
